evidence: "Chick flick? Yes, totally. But it was very good."
"It did have some very good action scenes, a bit reminiscent of the Matrix crossed with Bruce Lee."
"The storyline itself is true to the books and I love the characters, I just think they could stand to tone down some of the sexuality."
"The script wasn't quite as good (IMO) as the first movie, but as you might expect the special effects were stunning."
"It did have some very good action scenes, a bit reminiscent of the Matrix crossed with Bruce Lee."
"It was intensely violent and gory but more in a video game sort of way, not in a horror movie sort of way."
"The acting was superb. It gave a well thought out rendition of what likely happened from Mary's perspective of things from the conception of our Lord to His crucifixion."
"The special effects were stunning. I got this in 3D and it was pretty good that way."
"I'm not a Brad Pitt fan or a Zombie aficionado but the previews for this movie made me want to watch it anyway and it didn't disappoint."
"I'm glad to see Les back doing Survivorman again."
"The scenery in this show was stunning, especially in HD."
"The 3D added an element of immersion to it, there were a few scenes where the Zombies jumped out and the 3D made it more shocking."
"This was a terrific movie. Chick flick? Yes, totally. But it was very good."
"It gave a well thought out rendition of what likely happened from Mary's perspective of things from the conception of our Lord to His crucifixion."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of action, drama, and fantasy genres, with a strong preference for high-quality production and visual spectacle. They appreciate fast pacing and emotional resonance in storytelling, while showing some ambivalence towards narrative complexity and brand loyalty.
